shortDescription: Stylish 4-bedroom semi-detached in Cabbagetown South blending Victorian charm with contemporary living.
fullDescription: Welcome to 18 Spruce Street in the vibrant Cabbagetown South neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. All 4 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
Renovated galley kitchen with breakfast bar
